title: TCT Core
description: This mod adds functionality to standardize and group settings, information such as craft or other, is the download page of several mods compatible directly from Minecraft
body:
# TCT Core

This mod adds an interface to organize and standardize various settings and information (crafts, technical details, etc.). It also includes a built-in download page for several compatible mods directly from Minecraft.

Open the menu with the H key and navigate through the sections to configure or download a mod.

Available menus:

- Main Menu
- Shop
- Settings (example: Matmos)
  
For mods that don’t require specific configuration, you can simply view their information, crafts, or other features.

Compatible mods:

- TCT Core
- Matmos Ambient Sound
- TCT Flashlight
- Windows Computer
- TCT ClearLag
- SlenderMan TCT
- SetHome TCT
- Paladium V8
- Herobrine Survival
- FPS Optimizer
- FPS Boost
- Delete Nametag
- Jammy Furniture Remake
- CCTV Camera (CameraCraft)

If you are a modder and would like your mods to be compatible, feel free to contact me on CurseForge.
